description: Package-level external tools for AI model building (shared Python environment)

python3.description: Python 3 interpreter (required for all ML tools)

pip.notes: Installed with Python. Ubuntu 24.04 ships pip 24.0, but we upgrade to 24.3.1 for better dependency resolution and security fixes.

transformers.description: HuggingFace Transformers library for NLP models

onnx.description: ONNX (Open Neural Network Exchange) format library

onnxruntime.notes: Python 3.14 wheels start at 1.24.1. Kept on 1.24.x (not 1.25+) to avoid unreleased-API churn; MatMulNBitsQuantizer behavior is stable across 1.23.2→1.24.4.

onnxscript.description: ONNX Script for ONNX model authoring
